title: Solana Wallet Balances
description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.
